name: RandomMapAdapterProjections_V2b
author: Anthony Maio
blurb: Random Linear Map Adapters: seed-regenerated frozen Rademacher projections in attention + learned rank-128 LoRA adapters. 11.6MB artifact. Answers the challenge request for learning adapters on random linear maps. Structurally related to VeRA (ICLR 2024). Includes ablations across rank (8 vs 128), MLP vs attention-only, and torch.compile. Best variant disables MLP random maps and uses high adapter rank.
